text:
Snezhnaya Ecology Teaser - "Laws of the Bitter Frost" | Genshin Impact #GenshinSnezhnaya
In Snezhnaya, those who brave the cruel cold follow their own laws of survival.
Every road guided by the light of the polestar will, in the end, lead to the same destination.

author: Genshin Impact
text:
Version "Luna VIII" "Sunny Summer Fontinalia" Trailer | Genshin Impact  #GenshinLunaVIII
Version "Song of the Welkin Moon: Scherzo" "Sunny Summer Fontinalia" Trailer | Genshin Impact

From its reflection upon the water, we learn that the new moon has risen. Beneath the early summer night sky, we wander free and unhurried.
There is no need to hurry. Home is the destination we are sure to reach. Until then, let us listen to the songs along the way.

VA:
"Marionette" Sandrone — Deneen Melody
Citlali — Skyler Davenport
Furina — Amber Lee Connors
Charlotte — Rebecca Wang
Barbeloth of the Hexenzirkel, codename "B" — Harriet Kershaw
Wriothesley — Joe Zieja
"Moon Maiden" Columbina — Emi Lo
Aether — Zach Aguilar
Aria, Goddess of the Eternal Moon — Jessica McDonald

author: Genshin Impact
text:
Genshin Impact Version "Luna VIII" Special Program  #GenshinImpact #SpecialProgram
Dear Travelers,
This special program will feature juicy details about new game content and developments in Version "Luna VIII." It will also "drop" some redemption codes and other goodies!
Special thanks to you for your support and company. We will bring you more updates and information as they become available~
Traveler, we'll see you there!

(The redemption codes from this special program will expire on June 22, 00:00 (UTC-4), so be quick and redeem them~)
*After using the redemption code, the rewards will be sent to your in-game mailbox. The mail will expire after 30 days, so don't forget to claim your rewards in time.
